examples.example_purpose: Show a synthetic public GET proposal that is allowed only for inert analysis.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method GET, URL https://example.invalid/public/status, no headers, no body, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is ALLOW_INERT and ExecutionGateDecision is INERT_ANALYSIS_ONLY. BridgeDecision, ReleaseReview, ReleaseAuthorization, and SandboxExecutionResult are not reached.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Do not create an HTTP client, socket, browser action, adapter, API client, credential, or network request.

examples.example_purpose: Show a synthetic GET proposal with query data that is held for review.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method GET, URL https://example.invalid/search?topic=synthetic, query present, no headers, no body, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is HOLD_FOR_REVIEW and ExecutionGateDecision is HELD_FOR_REVIEW. No bridge, release, authorization, or execution is reached.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Treat query-bearing URL data as inert text; do not fetch, resolve, send, or inspect any network target.

examples.example_purpose: Show a request proposal with an authorization-header indicator that is blocked before execution.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method GET, URL https://api.example.invalid/account, headers present, credential indicator present_placeholder, no body. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is BLOCK and ExecutionGateDecision is BLOCKED. The lifecycle terminates before bridge, release, authorization, or execution.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Do not send headers, use credentials, create clients, or perform network activity.

examples.example_purpose: Show an external API POST proposal that is blocked because it implies mutation or creation.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method POST, URL https://api.example.invalid/orders, body present as synthetic create request placeholder, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is BLOCK and ExecutionGateDecision is BLOCKED. No external API mutation is authorized.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Do not perform POST, create an API client, send a body, or mutate external state.

examples.example_purpose: Show a request-body exfiltration-risk proposal that is blocked before execution.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method POST, URL https://api.example.invalid/upload, body present as synthetic confidential payload placeholder, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is BLOCK and ExecutionGateDecision is BLOCKED. No bridge, release, authorization, upload, or network execution occurs.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Treat body summary as inert text; do not transfer data, send a request, or create network clients.

examples.example_purpose: Show a localhost target proposal that is blocked as inert data before any local service access.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method GET, URL http://127.0.0.1/admin, localhost target, no headers, no body, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is BLOCK and ExecutionGateDecision is BLOCKED. Localhost access is not attempted.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Do not connect to localhost, resolve targets, open sockets, browse, or inspect local services.

examples.example_purpose: Show an unsupported scheme proposal that fails closed before any client creation.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method GET, URL ftp://example.invalid/export, unsupported scheme ftp, no headers, no body, no credential indicator. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is FAIL_CLOSED and ExecutionGateDecision is FAIL_CLOSED. No bridge, release, authorization, or execution is reached.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Treat unsupported scheme as inert text and fail closed before parsing into any network action.

examples.example_purpose: Show a hidden network request intent that fails closed.
examples.inert_request_summary: Method UNKNOWN, URL placeholder hidden-network-request-placeholder, unknown host/path, credential indicator unknown, body summary hidden request intent placeholder. URL, method, headers, body, and credential fields are inert documentation data only.
examples.protocol_lifecycle_summary: RuntimeRequest and ToolCallProposal are represented by the inert case. SafetyDecision is FAIL_CLOSED and ExecutionGateDecision is FAIL_CLOSED. Hidden network intent does not reach bridge, release, authorization, or execution.
examples.non_execution_requirement: Fail closed before tool execution; do not infer, discover, fetch, invoke, or execute hidden network behavior.
